name: Diligence Cafe
location: Unit 2A, Elizabeth Hall, Katipunan Avenue, Loyola Heights, Quezon City
description: Diligence Cafe provides a stress-free study and work environment with unlimited coffee, cozy napping areas, and convenient amenities like showers and printers.

name: WorkHaven Makati
description: A professional co-working environment in the heart of the business district. Ideal for meetings, collaborations, and networking.

name: Plug It - Coworking Space & Study Hub
location: 902 Eloisa Street corner España Boulevard, Sampaloc, Manila City
description: Plug It is a minimalist, quiet workspace with plenty of outlets and unlimited locally sourced coffee, making it easy to stay focused while supporting local farmers.

name: The Lib
location: 40 Esteban Abada Street, Loyola Heights, Quezon City
description: The Lib is a bright, Instagram-worthy café with delicious food, cozy interiors, and a motivating atmosphere that makes studying and working both productive and enjoyable.

name: HomeRoom Co-Working and Study Lounge
location: Dioresa Plaza, 1521 Dapitan Street, Sampaloc, Manila
description: HomeRoom offers flexible study spaces with both desks and floor seating, unlimited snacks, and amenities designed for comfort and convenience.

name: The Library at Ayala Museum
description: An art and research library offering a scholarly atmosphere with a vast collection of Filipiniana materials. A quiet and inspiring place to study.

name: 933 Creatives
description: 933 Creatives is a quirky coworking space designed for freelancers and creatives, offering a mix of professional and laid-back work areas to fuel productivity and imagination.

name: UP Diliman Main Library
description: The iconic main library of the University of the Philippines. Offers a vast, academic environment perfect for serious studying and research.

name: Kasa Green Residences Study Hub
description: A popular study hub for students from nearby universities (Ateneo, Miriam, UP). Known for its reliable internet and no-nonsense study atmosphere.

name: OrangeDesk Coworking Space And Study Lounge
location: España Boulevard corner P. Noval Street, Manila City
description: OrangeDesk is a playful and flexible study space that encourages creativity with unique seating options, drafting tables, and even a resident dog to help relieve stress.
